title: queltia triandra
intro: Queltia triandra, also known as the Red-flowered Quelisia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Menispermaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Queltia triandra include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. Queltia triandra can be used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are typically prepared by drying the plant's leaves and roots, then soaking them in a solvent such as water or ethanol.
